category_sources: Official nmh homepage describes nmh as a powerful electronic mail handling system and MH replacement.
source_facts.description says new version of the MH mail handler.
docs_sources: Official homepage provides project overview, source, mailing lists, help links, and is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: Official nmh homepage gives anonymous git checkout as git://git.savannah.nongnu.org/nmh.git and links browser source on Savannah.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was researched.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes a suite of shell-friendly mail handling commands.
